summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Transaction Orchestrator feature for NotaryChain. Backend: 23/24 tests passed (96%), 1 intermittent failure due to Hedera network timeout. Frontend: All pages and interactions tested successfully - Transactions list page, Transaction Room with all tabs (Overview, Tasks, Participants, Messages, Documents, AI), and New Transaction dialog.

minor.issue: Intermittent 520 timeout during transaction creation - caused by Hedera mirror node connection timeout
minor.notes: Backend logs show 'Connection to testnet.mirrornode.hedera.com timed out'. Retest passed immediately.

issues: Minor: Console warning about missing aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement

critical_code_review_comments: Good: All 4 system blueprints (Real Estate Closing, Business Contract, Estate Settlement, Trust Settlement) properly defined with steps
Good: HCS topic created on Hedera testnet for each transaction audit trail
Good: Task auto-generation from blueprint steps working correctly
Good: AI recommendations endpoint returning risk score, recommendations, and analysis
Good: Transaction Room provides full collaboration hub with Overview, Tasks, Participants, Messages, Documents, AI tabs
Good: Authorization checks prevent non-participants from viewing transactions (403 Forbidden)
Good: Settlement endpoint correctly validates all tasks completed before allowing blockchain seal
Note: Email invitations fail to deliver in Resend test mode (only verified email receives actual emails)
seed_data_creation: Multiple test transactions created with TEST_ prefix during testing. Transaction IDs include: 943880ae-968d-4f95-8a32-aebcd382235e (Real Estate Closing with HCS topic 0.0.7955037)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) Transaction Orchestrator feature fully working. 2) 4 system blueprints available. 3) HCS topics created on Hedera testnet for audit trail. 4) Transaction Room has 6 tabs: Overview, Tasks, Participants, Messages, Documents, AI. 5) AI analysis shows risk score and recommendations. 6) Settlement requires all tasks completed. 7) Hedera testnet may have occasional connection timeouts.

transactions_crud.POST /api/transactions: WORKING - creates transaction from blueprint with HCS topic

ai_api.GET /api/transactions/{id}/ai/recommenda: WORKING - returns risk score and recommendations

lifecycle_api.POST /api/transactions/{id}/settle: WORKING - validates tasks, rejects if incomplete

frontend_pages./transactions: WORKING - shows transaction list with stats, search, filter
frontend_pages./transactions/{id}: WORKING - Transaction Room with all tabs

hedera_integration.notes: Occasional connection timeouts to testnet.mirrornode.hedera.com - transient issue

transactions_page.transaction_list: Cards with name, type, participants, tasks, progress

transaction_room_page.header: Transaction name, status badge, type, Back button
transaction_room_page.overview_tab: Stats cards, Transaction Details, Blockchain Audit Trail, Quick Actions
transaction_room_page.tasks_tab: Task list with status, roles, requirements, Complete buttons
transaction_room_page.participants_tab: Participant cards with name, email, role, status
transaction_room_page.ai_tab: Risk Score, AI Recommendations with Run Analysis button

new_transaction_dialog.blueprint_selection: 4 blueprint cards (Real Estate, Business, Estate, Trust)
new_transaction_dialog.form_fields: Name, Description, Type dropdown, Participants, AI toggle
